Your designer, Ms. Pratima, has truly been the standout contributor to this project and the face of Bonito for us. She has been extremely dedicated, hardworking, and deserves full credit for the effort she put into designing our home. However, our overall experience with Bonito has not been satisfactory, and the project handover has also been delayed. There appears to be a lack of ownership and coordination among your teams. Bonito should prioritize projects on a first-in, first-out basis and ensure that commitments made to customers are consistently honored. column22: First of all, we found the overall cost to be quite high, and the project took much longer than expected. For a small 2BHK, 8 months felt excessive. Before booking, communication was quick and responsive, but after booking, we noticed significant delays in getting answers and updates. We often had to follow up repeatedly, which was frustrating. This is an area that definitely needs improvement—consistent communication and giving clients the same priority throughout the process would make a big difference.  That said, we are very happy with the final design. Our designer, Neha, was excellent—she understood our needs well, gave honest suggestions, and the outcome has turned out really nicely. Our project manager was also good, calm, and always willing to listen to our requests.  However, our experience with the rest of the team was disappointing.
